subtitle: KRAS, Bispecifics & Liquid Biopsy Edition
feed_desc: HER2-targeted neoadjuvant therapy 75% ORR in early rectal cancer with organ preservation (AACR 2026), BBO-11818 pan-KRAS inhibitor FDA Fast Track in PDAC (FDA/NCT06917079), Pfizer PD-1×VEGF bispecific Phase 3 in 1L mCRC (NCT07222800), Ultima Genomics ppmSeq WGS-based MRD in CRC (AACR 2026), PROACTIF Y90 radioembolization mOS 21.8 mo in HCC (EClinicalMedicine)

papers.title: HER2-Targeted Neoadjuvant Therapy Achieves 75% Response Rate in Early-Stage Rectal Cancer — Organ Preservation on the Horizon
papers.score_rationale: Base AACR oral presentation (7) + Phase II (+2) + biomarker-guided/precision (+1)
papers.summary: Presented at AACR 2026, this prospective single-arm MSK trial enrolled 10 patients with locally advanced HER2-positive, RAS wild-type, pMMR rectal adenocarcinoma (70% node-positive). Treatment consisted of 6 weeks of trastuzumab + tucatinib followed by 15 weeks of trastuzumab + tucatinib + FOLFOX/CAPOX. Six of eight evaluable patients responded (75% ORR), including four clinical complete responses (50% cCR). Patients achieving cCR transitioned to active surveillance without surgery or radiation. This precision neoadjuvant approach opens a potential watch-and-wait pathway for HER2-amplified rectal cancer, a particularly aggressive subtype.
papers.post_angle: HER2+ rectal cancer meets precision neoadjuvant therapy. 75% ORR, 50% complete responses — and the possibility of avoiding surgery. Organ preservation through molecular targeting is the future. #CRC #RectalCancer #HER2 #AACR2026 #OrganPreservation

papers.title: BBO-11818: FDA Grants Fast Track Designation for First-in-Class Pan-KRAS Inhibitor in Advanced KRAS-Mutant Pancreatic Cancer
papers.summary: The FDA granted Fast Track designation to BBO-11818 for adult patients with advanced KRAS-mutant PDAC. BBO-11818 is a first-in-class oral non-covalent small molecule targeting both active (ON) and inactive (OFF) KRAS states, providing pan-KRAS inhibition across G12D, G12V, and other mutations — not limited to G12C. Per ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT06917079), the Phase 1a/1b KONQUER-101 trial is enrolling 387 patients across PDAC, CRC, and NSCLC with combination arms including pembrolizumab, cetuximab, FOLFOX, and NALIRIFOX. Monotherapy has demonstrated confirmed partial responses in PDAC. Updated data expected H2 2026.
papers.post_angle: Pan-KRAS is the holy grail for PDAC. BBO-11818 hits KRAS in both ON and OFF states — covering G12D, G12V, and beyond. 387 patients enrolling with combo arms. Fast Track = FDA urgency. #PDAC #KRAS #PancreaticCancer #FDA #PrecisionMedicine

papers.title: Pfizer PF-08634404 (PD-1×VEGF Bispecific) Enters Phase 3 Symbiotic-GI-03 Trial in First-Line Metastatic Colorectal Cancer
papers.score_rationale: Base Press Release Phase 3 (6) + Phase III RCT (+3)
papers.summary: Pfizer announced its Phase 3 Symbiotic-GI-03 trial (NCT07222800) evaluating PF-08634404, a novel bispecific antibody targeting both PD-1 and VEGF, combined with chemotherapy versus bevacizumab plus chemotherapy in first-line mCRC (non-BRAF-mutated, microsatellite-stable). Per ClinicalTrials.gov, the trial enrolls 800 patients across 156 sites, with primary completion expected March 2030. PF-08634404 combines immune checkpoint inhibition and anti-angiogenesis in a single molecule. Updated Phase 2 data will be presented at ASCO 2026 (May 29 – June 2).
papers.post_angle: One molecule, two mechanisms. Pfizer bets big on PD-1×VEGF bispecific vs bevacizumab in 1L mCRC. 800 patients, 156 sites. If this works, it rewrites the frontline playbook. #CRC #ColorectalCancer #VEGF #ASCO2026

papers.title: Ultima Genomics ppmSeq: Whole-Genome Sequencing MRD Detection at Single-Digit Parts-Per-Million Sensitivity in Colorectal Cancer
papers.summary: At AACR 2026, Ultima Genomics presented six abstracts (including oral and plenary sessions) on its ppmSeq whole-genome sequencing technology for MRD detection. A validation pilot of 50 plasma samples achieved ctDNA detection at low single-digit parts-per-million sensitivity using tumor-specific variants from prior WGS — without customized assay panels. A multicenter prospective Netherlands Cancer Institute study is monitoring ctDNA-based treatment response in ~500 CRC patients on systemic chemotherapy. This panel-free approach could democratize MRD monitoring for every colon cancer patient.
papers.post_angle: MRD detection without custom panels? ppmSeq achieves parts-per-million ctDNA sensitivity using whole-genome sequencing. 500 CRC patients in prospective study. The future of surveillance just got more accessible. #MRD #ctDNA #CRC #AACR2026 #LiquidBiopsy

papers.title: PROACTIF: Y90 Radioembolization with Personalized Dosimetry Achieves 21.8-Month Median OS in 989 HCC Patients — Dose-Survival Relationship Confirmed
papers.authors: Guiu B, Bailly C, Vibert E et al.
papers.summary: Based on PubMed data (DOI: 10.1016/j.eclinm.2026.103884), this prospective multicenter PROACTIF cohort from 34 French sites enrolled 989 HCC patients treated with Y90 glass microspheres (TheraSphere). Median OS was 21.8 months overall, 27.0 months for BCLC-B, and 48.6 months for patients who proceeded to curative surgery (10.7%). A strong dose-survival relationship was confirmed: mOS 16.8 months with tumor dose <200 Gy vs 30.7 months with ≥400 Gy (p<0.001). Serious treatment-related AEs occurred in only 3.7%. Results support dosimetry-guided Y90 across all BCLC stages.
papers.post_angle: 989 HCC patients, one clear message: dose matters. Y90 with ≥400 Gy tumor dose = 30.7 months mOS. Personalized dosimetry is the key. And 10.7% converted to curative surgery. #HCC #LiverCancer #Y90 #SIRT #Dosimetry

additional.title: ELEVATE CRC: Magrolimab (CD47) Plus Bevacizumab-FOLFIRI Does Not Improve Efficacy in mCRC
additional.source_line: ESMO GI Oncology — Phase II: CD47 inhibitor magrolimab + bev-FOLFIRI did not improve PFS vs control (6.2 vs 6.7 mo), increased grade ≥3 AEs

additional.title: Global GI Cancer Burden Projected to Double by 2050: $26.1 Trillion Economic Impact
additional.source_line: Nature Health — 190-country analysis: 9.06M GI cancer cases by 2050 (+85%), CRC 11.6% of burden, biggest rises in PDAC diagnoses and CRC deaths

additional.title: Y90 with Personalized Dosimetry Achieves 71% Complete Response vs 33% with DEB-TACE in HCC
additional.source_line: Hepatology Communications — PSM study: Y90 personalized dosimetry outperforms DEB-TACE in target response (88% vs 58% ORR) and retreatment rates in BCLC A-B HCC

additional.title: Italian Nationwide GEP-NEN Prospective Database: 2,138 Patients from 38 Centers
additional.source_line: Lancet Regional Health Europe — Itanet registry: Ki-67 prognostic as continuous variable, 15% cutoff identifies worse outcomes, 58.6% diagnosed incidentally

additional.title: C2i Genomics Expands WGS MRD Data in Colon and Lung Cancer
additional.source_line: AACR 2026 — Whole-genome sequencing MRD test shows expanded clinical utility in colon cancer surveillance

additional.title: CancerVax Lipid Nanoparticle Platform Expands to Colorectal Cancer
additional.source_line: GlobeNewswire — Novel targeted LNP bypasses liver accumulation, reaches colon tissue; CRC added alongside PDAC, ICC, and HCC as target indications

KRAS, Bispecifics & Liquid Biopsy Edition

• HER2 neoadjuvant rectal cancer: 75% ORR, organ preservation potential
• FDA Fast Track for pan-KRAS inhibitor in PDAC

A thread 🧵👇

#GIOnc #CRC #PDAC #KRAS #AACR2026

x_thread.label: Post 2 — #1 HER2 Neoadjuvant Rectal
x_thread.text:
🔥 #1: HER2-Targeted Neoadjuvant Therapy in Early Rectal Cancer (AACR 2026)

MSK trial:
• Trastuzumab + tucatinib + chemo in HER2+/RAS-WT/pMMR rectal cancer
• 6/8 patients responded (75% ORR)
• 4 clinical complete responses (50% cCR)
• cCR patients → active surveillance, no surgery

Precision neoadjuvant therapy meets rectal cancer. When you match the right target, the scalpel may not be needed.

#RectalCancer #HER2 #OrganPreservation #AACR2026

x_thread.label: Post 3 — #2 BBO-11818 Pan-KRAS
x_thread.text:
🎯 #2: BBO-11818 Pan-KRAS Inhibitor — FDA Fast Track for PDAC

• First-in-class oral pan-KRAS: targets ON + OFF states
• Covers G12D, G12V, and beyond — not just G12C
• Confirmed PR in PDAC (KONQUER-101, NCT06917079)
• 387 patients enrolling with combo arms: pembro, cetux, FOLFOX, NALIRIFOX

The pan-KRAS race is on. BBO-11818 tackles the mutations that matter most in PDAC.

#PDAC #KRAS #PancreaticCancer #FDA #PrecisionMedicine

x_thread.label: Post 4 — #3 Pfizer PD-1×VEGF mCRC
x_thread.text:
🌍 #3: Pfizer PD-1×VEGF Bispecific Enters Phase 3 in 1L mCRC

Symbiotic-GI-03 (NCT07222800):
• 800 patients across 156 sites
• PF-08634404 + chemo vs bevacizumab + chemo
• 1L MSS, non-BRAF mCRC
• One molecule combining IO + anti-angiogenesis

Big pharma is coming for bevacizumab. Phase 2 data at ASCO 2026 will hint at whether this bispecific can dethrone the standard.

#CRC #ColorectalCancer #VEGF #ASCO2026

x_thread.label: Post 5 — #4 Ultima Genomics MRD
x_thread.text:
🧪 #4: Ultima Genomics ppmSeq — WGS-Based MRD at Parts-Per-Million Sensitivity

AACR 2026:
• 6 presentations including oral + plenary
• Single-digit ppm ctDNA detection
• No customized panels needed — tumor-informed WGS
• 500 CRC patients in prospective Dutch study

MRD without custom panels = democratized ctDNA monitoring for every colon cancer patient. The future of surveillance is genomic.

#MRD #ctDNA #CRC #AACR2026 #LiquidBiopsy

x_thread.label: Post 6 — #5 PROACTIF Y90 HCC
x_thread.text:
📊 #5: PROACTIF — Y90 Personalized Dosimetry in 989 HCC Patients

Prospective multicenter (34 French sites):
• mOS 21.8 months overall
• Tumor dose ≥400 Gy: mOS 30.7 mo vs 16.8 mo (<200 Gy)
• 10.7% converted to curative surgery (mOS 48.6 mo)
• Serious treatment-related AEs: only 3.7%

Dose matters. Personalized dosimetry is the key to unlocking Y90’s full potential in HCC.

#HCC #LiverCancer #Y90 #SIRT #Dosimetry
